items.title_en: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August

items.desc_en: The S&P 500 was relatively unchanged on Monday, while oil prices fell, as Wall Street assessed the latest developments in the Iran war negotiations.

items.title_en: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
items.title_zh: “失败的奖励”：投资者对塔吉特董事长布莱恩康奈尔的支持降至有史以来的最低水平
items.desc_en: Target chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.
items.desc_zh: Target 董事长布莱恩·康奈尔 (Brian Cornell) 将这家零售商打造成价值超过 1000 亿美元的巨头，但最近的困境和业绩不佳引发了投资者要求变革的呼声。

items.title_en: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back into the country
items.title_zh: 万斯表示伊朗将允许核检查人员返回该国

items.desc_zh: 美国副总统表示，美国和伊朗第一轮会谈后取得了很大进展。

items.title_en: SpaceX makes bond sale days after record IPO, discloses over $100 billion cash pile
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在创纪录的 IPO 几天后发行债券，披露了超过 1000 亿美元的现金储备
items.desc_en: SpaceX on Monday unveiled a senior unsecured notes offering and said it held about $100.8 billion in cash.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 周一推出了一项高级无担保票据发行，并表示其持有约 1008 亿美元现金。

items.title_en: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
items.title_zh: 首席运营官马克·温特霍夫 (Marc Winterhoff) 离职，Lucid 将裁员约 18% 的美国员工
items.desc_en: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.
items.desc_zh: 作为成本节约计划的一部分，Lucid Group 将在美国裁员 18%。它还表示，首席运营官马克·温特霍夫(Marc Winterhoff)将立即离职。

items.desc_en: During a live BBC News broadcast, reporter Paul Njie interviews a Cape Verde fan when the country suddenly scores its first ever World Cup goal against Uruguay in the 2026 World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 在 BBC 新闻直播中，记者 Paul Njie 采访了一名佛得角球迷，当时佛得角在 2026 年世界杯对阵乌拉圭的比赛中突然攻入了世界杯首个进球。

items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。
